case_title: MOONRISE MEDIA, LLC VS. CATHY JEAN SHOES, INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY MOONRISE MEDIA, LLC CATHY JEAN SHOES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-31-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOONRISE MEDIA, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATHY JEAN SHOES, INC. $4,732.25 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,832.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CATHY JEAN SHOES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2014 - BOTH PARTIES - PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON CROSS CLAIM. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2014 BY JPT JEAN MILEFF, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: B.PAREDES, NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CATHY JEAN SHOES, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MOONRISE MEDIA, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
